subcodes.first_line: O Leaf! Thy mention hath been and ever shall be before the Wronged One. Call thou to mind those days when thou didst stand before Our face in the Most Great Prison [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقه ذکرت لدی المظلوم بوده و هست ذکر کن ایامی را که در سجن اعظم امام وجه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @call to action
